course.title: XP Farm!!
course.description: Learn English with Minecraft — Episode 22. 5 curated listening segments with cloze quizzes.

lesson.title: Learn English with Minecraft #21 - XP Farm!!
lesson.transcript_en: Hello and welcome to episode 21 of learn English with Minecraft this is a series where I teach English while trying to beat Minecraft my name is Kenzo and this is English from the ground up so in the last video I left off deep underground but I dug my way back up to the surface the surface so this is the tunnel that I dug to get back up to the surface but I found something interesting down so I'm going to go down this tunnel to show you what I found okay here we are this is the bottom of the staircase so right here I found a spider spawner this is a spider spawner so if I broke all of these torches and it became dark spiders would begin spawning here I actually found two of these in the last video but unfortunately I broke both of them I recently watched a video on YouTube about how you can turn these spider spawners into an XP farm so not the kind of farm that grows wheat or carrots or potatoes no not that kind of farm an XP farm is a farm that generates experience so in this video I'm going to try to turn this spider spawner into an XP farm and to do that I'm going to follow this video okay so it looks like the first step is to dig out a nine by nine block area around the spawner I'm going to begin digging around the let's go okay one two three four five six seven eight nine there's nine this way now one two three four five six seven eight nine okay so here I've dug out a nine by nine block area around the spawner see one two three four five six seven eight nine by one two three four five six seven eight nine so now the next step is to dig three blocks down I'm going to place torches on the walls torch torch because when I break these blocks right here they'll destroy the Torches and spiders might spawn so I'm going to move the Torches to the there we go and now I'm going to begin digging down three blocks one two three this is going to take me a long time all right I finally finished digging three blocks down one two three and I found some iron right here I'm going to mine the iron oh and the Redstone that was actually a lot of iron I'm going to fill this up up all right cool now I need to watch the video to see what to do next back to YouTube for the next step I need a bucket a bucket of water which means I need to go back up to the surface all right so I'll dig a staircase up let's go back up to the surface and ta-da the surface all right now to find a bucket aha a water bucket and while I'm up here I'm also going to check out my garden see if anything is ready to be harvested let's open the gates and let's check out the garden it looks like these potatoes are ready to be harvested three potatoes now I'll re-plant the potatoes one two and I think that was the only potato ready to be harvested but I see lots of wheat that's ready all right let's see 19 Wheats and now I have 47 seeds so right now I'm going to plant all 47 of these wheat seeds all right I have a lot of wheat growing now oh another thing that I found down in the mine before I dug my tunnel back up to the surface is some amethyst and with the amethyst I this spyglass the Spyglass allows me to see really far I can see a cow with my spyglass I can see a sheep over there a sheep next to some flowers red flowers yellow flowers blue flowers and white flowers what else can I see from up here with my spy glass I can see some fish down there in the that fish disappeared ah I can see a horse with my spyglass two horses there's another horse right here this horse has spots and it started to rain now that it's raining this would be a good time to fish I'm going to get my fishing pole and catch a couple of fish while it's raining I'm going to use my enchanted fishing all right and I'll go to my fishing Hut right there and I'll cast My Line cast let's see what I can catch here we go and my first catch was a Cod of course another Cod I love how fast I can catch fish when it's raining another Cod a puffer fish what are you doing squid another Cod puffer fish I still don't know what to do with the puffer fish another magic fishing rod lure three and Unbreaking three this magical fishing rod is even better than the magical fishing rod I'm using right now this Rod has two enchantments and this Rod only has one it's getting darker three more catches that's one that's two and one more and a Cod all right I heard a drowned throw a trident at me oh no run run come here zombie those little zombies are really fast I need to eat all right now I'm regaining my health there's the zombie oh and the drowned there's a zombie and a drowned right die die oh there's two drowns outside these drowns are strong I ate all of my bread all right where are you did I kill both of them I guess so did I get the Trident no okay it's time to go to sleep all right it's morning and the rain stops alright so before I go back down to the spawner I want to make sure that I have everything I will need to build the XP I'm going back to the video to see what else I will need to build this Farm I will need three trap doors three slabs three signs three chests three hoppers three walls and two buckets of water okay well now I'm going to make sure that I have all of that I think I have a lot of trapdoors somewhere no trap doors 11 trap doors one two three now I need three slabs we'll build Cobblestone slabs there we go six slabs three trap doors what else did I need uh three signs and three chests I know that I have signs somewhere as one sign only one huh well I only found one sign right here so I need to build two more with wood so one stick and six wood builds three okay Signs Now I need to find some chests alright two chests one more chest and there we go three what else three Hoppers and three walls how do you build hoppers so to build Hoppers you need one two three four five five iron and one chest so actually I need to build three more all right more wood chest one two three all right six chests and one two three so now I'm going to build three hoppers there we go three Hoppers and now I just need to build Cobblestone walls okay easy now before I go back down I'm going to start cooking some fish there we go all right time to go back down to the and here we go now we're at the bottom so what do I need to do now back to the tutorial as always I forgot something I need two buckets of water not just one back up the long staircase all right do I have another bucket buckets buckets any buckets so I need to build one using one two three iron there we go and now I'm going to fill it up with oh I need food is my right here one two three three blocks by one two blocks like that and this hole needs to go seven blocks so one two three it needs to go that deep hmm and there we go it's finished now what okay now I
